name: commit-commands
description: Codex workflows for committing changes, publishing branches, and cleaning stale local branches.

interface.shortDescription: Commit, push, PR, and branch cleanup workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills that mirror the practical workflows of Claude Code's commit commands plugin: create a well-scoped commit, publish a branch and open a draft PR, and clean up local branches whose upstreams are gone.
defaultPrompt: Commit the relevant changes in this repo with a message that matches recent history
Publish this work: create a branch if needed, commit, push, and open a draft PR
Clean up local branches whose remote upstreams are gone
